description: Create a voice-controlled on-screen ruler using Talon's canvas API. Develop a new module at C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\screen_ruler\ containing ruler.py and ruler.talon. The system must track start and end coordinates, draw a line between them on a canvas, calculate the Euclidean pixel distance, and display the measurement text near the line. Implement the following actions: user.ruler_mark_start() (sets start at current mouse position), user.ruler_mark_end() (sets end at current mouse position and updates display), and user.ruler_clear() (resets coordinates and hides the canvas). Map these actions in ruler.talon to the voice commands "ruler start here", "ruler end here", and "ruler clear".
